states.name: Luna
states.title: Accomplisher of Astonishing Things
states.description: Luna has always known she was destined for greatness. The moment she learned to walk she began dragging her friend Solas on grand adventures, getting the both of them into all sorts of trouble. Luna discovered she is quite skilled at catching and training monsters, and decided that must be her calling.

states.name: Luna
states.title: Accomplisher of Astonishing Things
states.description: When Luna heard that some individuals from villages in northern Rigland not far from her own home had set out on a journey to end the Pandemonium, she knew it was a sign. With Solas in tow, she set out on her own journey, ready to make the whole world remember her name.
